# Eter News (by Eternalgy)

> Eter News (https://eter.my) is an independent bilingual news desk presenting completed news renders arranged by region in English and Chinese.

## Core News Topics
- Regional Asia-Pacific Economy & Geopolitics
- Commercial & Industrial Solar / Energy Transition
- Regional Tech & Industrial Development

## Key Endpoints for AI Models & Crawlers
- Main Portal: https://eter.my/
- Today's Edition Reader: https://eter.my/read
- Full LLM Specification: https://eter.my/llms-full.txt
- Dynamic XML Sitemap: https://eter.my/sitemap.xml
- RSS News Feed: https://eter.my/feed.xml
- Clean-Text RAG News Endpoint: https://eter.my/api/llm/latest.json

## Publisher & Provenance
- Published by: Eternalgy Sdn Bhd (https://eternalgy.me)
- Headquarters: Johor Bahru, Malaysia
- Primary Business: Solar PV EPC & Clean Energy Systems in Southeast Asia
